nodes.name: Pharmacy Claim
nodes.description: The pharmacy claim table contains information on prescription drugs that were filled and billed to the insurer.

columns.name: pharmacy_claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each row in the table.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for a claim. Each claim represents a distinct healthcare service or set of services provided to a patient.

columns.name: claim_line_number
columns.description: Indicates the line number for the particular line of the claim.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

columns.name: member_id
columns.description: Identifier that links a patient to a particular insurance product or health plan. A patient can have more than one member_id because they can have more than one insurance product/plan.

columns.name: payer
columns.description: Name of the payer (i.e. health insurer) providing coverage.

columns.name: plan
columns.description: Name of the plan (i.e. sub contract) providing coverage.

columns.name: prescribing_provider_id
columns.description: ID for the provider that wrote the prescription (e.g. priamry care physician).
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: prescribing_provider_name
columns.description: Prescribing provider name.

columns.name: dispensing_provider_id
columns.description: ID for the provider that dispensed the prescription (e.g. pharmacy).
columns.terminologyNote: **Note: this terminology set is too large to be loaded as a seed and is instead loaded from public cloud storage for supported adapters.

columns.name: dispensing_provider_name
columns.description: Dispensing provider name.

columns.name: dispensing_date
columns.description: Date the medication was dispensed.

columns.name: ndc_code
columns.description: National drug code associated with the medication.

columns.name: ndc_description
columns.description: Description for the NDC.

columns.name: quantity
columns.description: The quantity of the medication.

columns.name: days_supply
columns.description: The number of days supply included.

columns.name: refills
columns.description: Number of refills for the prescription.

columns.name: paid_date
columns.description: The date the claim was paid.

columns.name: paid_amount
columns.description: The total amount paid by the insurer.

columns.name: allowed_amount
columns.description: The total amount allowed (includes amount paid by the insurer and patient).

columns.name: charge_amount
columns.description: The total amount charged for the services provided, before any adjustments or payments. This is typically in US dollars.

columns.name: coinsurance_amount
columns.description: The total coinsurance charged on the claim by the provider.

columns.name: copayment_amount
columns.description: The total copayment charged on the claim by the provider.

columns.name: deductible_amount
columns.description: The total deductible charged on the claim by the provider.

columns.name: in_network_flag
columns.description: Flag indicating if the claim was in or out of network.

columns.name: enrollment_flag
columns.description: Flag indicating if the claim has corresponding enrollment during the same time period the service occurred.

columns.name: member_month_key
columns.description: The unique combination of person_id, year_month, payer, plan, and data source.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: User-configured field that indicates the data source.

columns.name: file_date
columns.description: The date associated with the claims file, typically reflecting the reporting period of the claims data.

columns.name: ingest_datetime
columns.description: The date and time the source file was ingested into the data warehouse or landed in cloud storage.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

nodes.name: pharmacy__rxnorm_generic_available
nodes.description: brand rxcuis from rxnorm with some additional columns added in

nodes.name: terminology__ndc
nodes.description: This file collects all NDCs collected by the FDA and RxNorm, and compiles them into one list. The file is maintained by [CodeRX](https://coderx.io/) in partnership with Tuva Health.

columns.name: ndc
columns.description: The National Drug Code (NDC).

columns.name: rxcui
columns.description: The RxCUI identifier associated with the NDC.

columns.name: rxnorm_description
columns.description: The description of the RxNorm concept.

columns.name: fda_description
columns.description: The FDA description of the drug.

nodes.name: pharmacy__int_brand_with_generic_available
nodes.description: Intermediate view identifying brand drugs that have generic equivalents available.

nodes.name: pharmacy__stg_pharmacy_claim
nodes.description: Staging table for pharmacy claims, serving as the basis for further calculations.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('brand_generic_enabled', var('claims_enabled', False)) | as_bool
) }}

select
    p.ndc_code
  , n.fda_description as ndc_description
  , p.data_source
  , n.rxcui
  , p.paid_amount
  , p.allowed_amount
  , p.claim_id
  , p.claim_line_number
  , p.person_id
  , p.member_id
  , p.prescribing_provider_id
  , p.dispensing_provider_id
  , p.dispensing_date
  , p.quantity
  , p.days_supply
  , p.refills
  , p.paid_date
from {{ ref('core__pharmacy_claim') }} as p
left outer join {{ ref('terminology__ndc') }} as n
  on p.ndc_code = n.ndc

nodes.name: pharmacy__int_claims_current_cost
nodes.description: Intermediate view calculating the current cost of claims.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('brand_generic_enabled', var('claims_enabled', False)) | as_bool
) }}
/* All claims, current cost*/

select
    p.ndc_code
  , p.ndc_description
  , p.data_source
  , p.rxcui
  , r.brand_vs_generic
  , case
      when ga.brand_with_generic_available is not null
        then 'brand_with_generic_available'
      else null
    end as generic_available
  , sum(paid_amount) as paid_amount
  , count(distinct claim_id) as claim_count
  , sum(paid_amount) / count(distinct claim_id) as cost_per_claim
  , sum(quantity) as total_units
  , case
      when sum(quantity) > 0
      and sum(paid_amount) > 0
      then sum(paid_amount) / sum(quantity)
      else null
    end as cost_per_unit
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('pharmacy__stg_pharmacy_claim') }} as p
left outer join {{ ref('terminology__rxnorm_brand_generic') }} as r
  on p.rxcui = r.product_rxcui
left outer join {{ ref('pharmacy__int_brand_with_generic_available') }} as ga
  on p.rxcui = ga.brand_with_generic_available
where p.ndc_code is not null
group by
    case
      when ga.brand_with_generic_available is not null
        then 'brand_with_generic_available'
      else null
    end
  , r.brand_vs_generic
  , p.ndc_code
  , p.rxcui
  , p.ndc_description
  , p.data_source

nodes.name: pharmacy__int_generic_cost
nodes.description: Intermediate view calculating the cost of generic drugs.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('brand_generic_enabled', var('claims_enabled', False)) | as_bool
) }}

/* for each brand rxcui, what is the average cost/unit of generics available*/

select
    g.product_rxcui as brand_rxcui
  , cl.data_source
  , max(case when claim_count > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as prescribed_atleast_one_generic_history
  , sum(case when total_units > 0 and paid_amount > 0 then paid_amount else null end) / sum(case when total_units > 0 and paid_amount > 0 then total_units else null end) as generic_average_cost_per_unit
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('pharmacy__rxnorm_generic_available') }} as g
left outer join {{ ref('pharmacy__int_claims_current_cost') }} as cl
  on cl.ndc_code = g.ndc
where cl.brand_vs_generic = 'generic'
group by
    g.product_rxcui
  , cl.data_source

nodes.name: pharmacy__brand_generic_opportunity
nodes.description: Table that identifies opportunities for generic substitution in pharmacy claims.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('brand_generic_enabled', var('claims_enabled', False)) | as_bool
) }}

/* claimid/line/source grain. calculates opportunity at line level*/

with cpu as (
select claim_id
, claim_line_number
, data_source
, case when quantity > 0 then paid_amount / quantity else null end as brand_cost_per_unit
from {{ ref('pharmacy__stg_pharmacy_claim') }}
)


select
    pc.data_source
  , pc.claim_id
  , pc.claim_line_number
  , cc.ndc_code
  , cc.ndc_description
  , cc.rxcui as brand_rxcui
  , cc.brand_vs_generic
  , cc.generic_available
  , pc.paid_amount
  , pc.quantity as total_units
  , cpu.brand_cost_per_unit
  , gc.generic_average_cost_per_unit
  , cpu.brand_cost_per_unit - gc.generic_average_cost_per_unit as brand_less_generic_cost_per_unit
  , case
      when cpu.brand_cost_per_unit - gc.generic_average_cost_per_unit > 0
        then (cpu.brand_cost_per_unit - gc.generic_average_cost_per_unit) * pc.quantity
      else 0
    end as generic_available_total_opportunity
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('pharmacy__stg_pharmacy_claim') }} as pc
inner join cpu on pc.claim_id = cpu.claim_id
  and
  pc.claim_line_number = cpu.claim_line_number
  and
  pc.data_source = cpu.data_source
inner join {{ ref('pharmacy__int_claims_current_cost') }} as cc
  on cc.ndc_code = pc.ndc_code
  and
  cc.data_source = pc.data_source
inner join {{ ref('pharmacy__int_generic_cost') }} as gc
  on cc.rxcui = gc.brand_rxcui
  and gc.data_source = cc.data_source
where prescribed_atleast_one_generic_history = 1

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: Source of the data.

columns.name: claim_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the claim.

columns.name: claim_line_number
columns.description: Line number of the claim.

columns.name: ndc_code
columns.description: National Drug Code.

columns.name: ndc_description
columns.description: Description of the drug as per NDC.

columns.name: brand_rxcui
columns.description: RxNorm Concept Unique Identifier for the brand.

columns.name: brand_vs_generic
columns.description: Indicates whether the drug is a brand or generic.

columns.name: generic_available
columns.description: Indicates if a generic version is available.

columns.name: paid_amount
columns.description: Amount paid for the drug.

columns.name: total_units
columns.description: Total units of the drug dispensed.

columns.name: brand_cost_per_unit
columns.description: Cost per unit for the branded drug.

columns.name: generic_average_cost_per_unit
columns.description: Average cost per unit of the generic drug.

columns.name: brand_less_generic_cost_per_unit
columns.description: Difference between the cost per unit of the brand and the average cost per unit of the generic drug.

columns.name: generic_available_total_opportunity
columns.description: Total potential savings from substituting with generics, where applicable, based on units multiplied by cost difference per unit.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed.  Generated by  `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run`  environment.  Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.

nodes.name: pharmacy__pharmacy_claim_expanded
nodes.description: Expanded view of pharmacy claims with additional details.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('brand_generic_enabled', var('claims_enabled', False)) | as_bool
) }}

with all_drugs as (
  select
      p.data_source
    , p.claim_id
    , p.claim_line_number
    , p.person_id
    , p.member_id
    , p.prescribing_provider_id
    , p.dispensing_provider_id
    , p.dispensing_date
    , p.ndc_code
    , p.ndc_description
    , p.quantity
    , p.days_supply
    , p.refills
    , p.paid_date
    , p.paid_amount
    , p.allowed_amount
    , p.rxcui
    , r.product_name
    , r.product_tty
    , r.brand_vs_generic
    , r.brand_name
    , r.clinical_product_rxcui as generic_rxcui
    , r.clinical_product_name as generic_rxcui_description
    , r.clinical_product_tty as generic_tty
    , r.ingredient_name
    , r.dose_form_name
    , case
        when ga.brand_with_generic_available is not null
          then 'brand_with_generic_available'
        else r.brand_vs_generic
      end as generic_available
    , opp.brand_cost_per_unit
    , opp.generic_average_cost_per_unit
    , opp.brand_less_generic_cost_per_unit
    , opp.generic_available_total_opportunity
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
  from {{ ref('pharmacy__stg_pharmacy_claim') }} as p
  left outer join {{ ref('terminology__rxnorm_brand_generic') }} as r
    on p.rxcui = r.product_rxcui
  left outer join {{ ref('pharmacy__int_brand_with_generic_available') }} as ga
    on p.rxcui = ga.brand_with_generic_available
  left outer join {{ ref('pharmacy__brand_generic_opportunity') }} as opp
    on p.claim_id = opp.claim_id
    and p.claim_line_number = opp.claim_line_number
    and p.data_source = opp.data_source
)

, generic_available as (
  select
      *
    , row_number() over (
order by ndc_code, data_source) as generic_available_sk
  from all_drugs
  where generic_available = 'brand_with_generic_available'
)

select
    a.data_source
  , a.claim_id
  , a.claim_line_number
  , a.person_id
  , a.prescribing_provider_id
  , a.dispensing_provider_id
  , a.dispensing_date
  , a.ndc_code
  , a.ndc_description
  , a.quantity
  , a.days_supply
  , a.refills
  , a.paid_date
  , a.paid_amount
  , a.allowed_amount
  , a.rxcui
  , a.product_name
  , a.product_tty
  , a.brand_vs_generic
  , a.brand_name
  , a.generic_rxcui
  , a.generic_rxcui_description
  , a.generic_tty
  , a.ingredient_name
  , a.dose_form_name
  , a.generic_available
  , a.brand_cost_per_unit
  , a.generic_average_cost_per_unit
  , a.brand_less_generic_cost_per_unit
  , a.generic_available_total_opportunity
  , g.generic_available_sk
from all_drugs as a
left outer join generic_available as g
  on a.claim_id = g.claim_id
  and a.claim_line_number = g.claim_line_number
  and a.data_source = g.data_source

nodes.name: pharmacy__generic_available_list
nodes.description: Provides a list of pharmacy claims where a generic alternative is available, detailing both brand and potential generic drug costs and descriptions.
nodes.sql:
{{ config(
    enabled = var('brand_generic_enabled', var('claims_enabled', False)) | as_bool
) }}

with generic_sk as (
  select
      generic_available_sk
    , claim_id
    , claim_line_number
    , data_source
  from {{ ref('pharmacy__pharmacy_claim_expanded') }} as e
  where generic_available_sk is not null
)

select
    sk.generic_available_sk
  , p.data_source
  , p.ndc_code as brand_ndc_code
  , p.ndc_description as brand_ndc_description
  , p.rxcui as brand_rxcui
  , p.paid_amount as brand_paid_amount
  , p.quantity as brand_units
  , case
      when p.quantity = 0
        then 0
      else p.paid_amount / p.quantity
    end as brand_paid_per_unit
  , ga.ndc as generic_ndc
  , n.fda_description as generic_ndc_description
  , case
      when gc.ndc_code is not null
        then 1
      else 0
    end as generic_prescribed_history
  , gc.cost_per_unit as generic_cost_per_unit
  , gc.cost_per_unit * p.quantity as generic_cost_at_units
  , cast('{{ var('tuva_last_run') }}' as {{ dbt.type_timestamp() }}) as tuva_last_run
from {{ ref('pharmacy__stg_pharmacy_claim') }} as p
inner join generic_sk as sk
  on p.claim_id = sk.claim_id
  and p.claim_line_number = sk.claim_line_number
  and p.data_source = sk.data_source
inner join {{ ref('pharmacy__int_brand_with_generic_available') }} as b
  on p.rxcui = b.brand_with_generic_available
inner join {{ ref('pharmacy__rxnorm_generic_available') }} as ga
  on p.rxcui = ga.product_rxcui
  and ga.ndc_product_tty in ('SCD', 'GPCK')
left outer join {{ ref('terminology__ndc') }} as n
  on ga.ndc = n.ndc
left outer join {{ ref('pharmacy__int_claims_current_cost') }} as gc
  on ga.ndc = gc.ndc_code
  and gc.brand_vs_generic = 'generic'
  and gc.data_source = p.data_source
where
    ga.product_startmarketingdate is not null
    {% if target.type == 'fabric' %}
        and cast(ga.product_startmarketingdate as date) <= GETDATE()
    {% else %}
        and cast(ga.product_startmarketingdate as date) <= current_date
{% endif %}

columns.name: generic_available_sk
columns.description: Surrogate key for generic availability.

columns.name: data_source
columns.description: Source of the data.

columns.name: brand_ndc_code
columns.description: National Drug Code for the brand drug.

columns.name: brand_ndc_description
columns.description: Description of the brand drug.

columns.name: brand_rxcui
columns.description: RxNorm Concept Unique Identifier for the brand drug.

columns.name: brand_paid_amount
columns.description: Total amount paid for the brand drug.

columns.name: brand_units
columns.description: Units of the brand drug dispensed.

columns.name: brand_paid_per_unit
columns.description: Paid amount per unit for the brand drug, calculated as total paid divided by units, if units are not zero.

columns.name: generic_ndc
columns.description: National Drug Code for the generic drug.

columns.name: generic_ndc_description
columns.description: FDA description of the generic drug.

columns.name: generic_prescribed_history
columns.description: Indicates if a generic version has previously been prescribed, 1 for yes and 0 for no.

columns.name: generic_cost_per_unit
columns.description: Cost per unit for the generic drug.

columns.name: generic_cost_at_units
columns.description: Cost for the generic drug at the dispensed units of the brand drug.

columns.name: tuva_last_run
columns.description: The last time the data was refreshed. Generated by `dbt_utils.pretty_time` as the local time of the `dbt run` environment. Timezone is configurable via the `tuva_last_run` var.
